title: Reconnect after buffer eviction (seq gap)
description: SSE client reconnects with a cursor that points to events already evicted from the in-memory buffer. A gap event should be emitted, and the client should fall back to the DB-backed pull endpoint for full recovery.
production_scenario: A mobile client disconnects for hours and reconnects. The in-memory buffer has wrapped around. The system must signal the gap so the client can fetch missed events from Postgres rather than silently skipping them.
